nodes.name: Rusty-backed spinetail
nodes.summary: Rusty-backed spinetail（Rusty-backed spinetail，学名 Cranioleuca vulpina），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联1个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: American Ornithological Society
nodes.summary: American Ornithological Society是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联80种鸟类，包括黑頭鴨、绿翅雁、Chaco chachalaca等80种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: reiseri: northeastern Brazil The South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has only sight records from Guyana and so classes the species as hypothetical in that country. The rusty-backed spinetail inhabits a variety of landscapes, all of which are on or near water
